title: OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Answers questions about coverage packets, benefits, and ID cards. Assists OHP members on how to resolve problems involving access or quality of care. Investigates allegations of inappropriate denials of covered benefits. Helps members to navigate through a system of Coordinated Care Organizations. Researches and resolves medical bills received by OHP clients. Receives and records client complaints about misuse or inappropriate disclosure of the client's private health information. Assists members with Open Card to resolve problems with filling prescriptions. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Enrolled OHP clients Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (800) 273-0557 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 273-0557 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information and to report changes FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Medicaid Fraud Reporting Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OHA OMBUDS PROGRAM FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON HEALTH PLAN SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OREGON VETERAN DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS
